snippet.title: Spigen Ultra Hybrid S MagFit iPhone 17 Review - Strong Protection, Terrible Design Choices
snippet.description:
At first glance, the Spigen Ultra Hybrid S MagFit looks like the perfect clear iPhone case. Thicker back, rotating kickstand, metallic buttons… premium everything. But then you run the tests, look at the build, and find two red flags that just ruin the whole package.

Get your own Spigen for iPhone 17 Pro Max Case, Ultra Hybrid S MagFit [TPU Covered Camera Control] [Kickstand] [Compatible with MagSafe] by using this link: https://mreh.ca/4oKWh8S
*This is an Amazon affiliate link that will bring you to the right Amazon store for your location

#ReviewerNotInfluencer #Reviews #iPhone

In this video:
0:00 Intro
0:21 Design
0:51 Handling & Usability
1:43 Protection Features
2:28 Drop Protection
3:25 Should You Get It?

Spigen for iPhone 17 Pro Max Case, Ultra Hybrid S MagFit [TPU Covered Camera Control] [Kickstand] [Compatible with MagSafe] Review

-looks like your typical clear case
-back is thicker than most
-but the camera lump is still...squishy
-this case has a built in kickstand
-and unlike previous versions
-it rotates
-seems like a great idea until...
-it makes no difference in the functionality of the kickstand
-grip on the case is your typical TPU edge case
-slightly tacky
-super back
-the kickstand adds to the bulk of the case
-coming in at 63g (Avg is now 50g)
-and will make your ipHone feel 66% bigger
-that's the middle of the road type bulk
-for corner drops, the intial impact was around 9.3G's
-11% better than average
-the amount of rotation after a camera drop was around 24% less
-so the thicker corners damped that part of the drop
-settling rate was 10% worse
-my guess is from the thicker back storing a bit more energy during the drop
-total force overall is 13% lower than average which is pretty good

-from a corner drop perspective, yea, awesome
-for face first drops
-it failed
-screen protector made contact with the table

-for the camera lump, the Ultra Hybrid S has a large TPU bumper
-and it doesn't do much for the initial drop
-BUT the settling rate was way higher because of the big bumper
-the vibrations calmed down quick with the lip
-BUT didn't help the total force because of the big initial drop
-now unlike other clear cases,
-this case has some heft, back is 3.3mm thick, corners are 2.1mm
-there are air cushions and spigen forgot to label them?
-this case mitigates the rainbowing on the clear cases by having a gap between the back of the case and iPhone
-for rigidity, even though the back is thicker, the top is TPU so it only took 31N to bend 8mm
-8% better
-for magsafe, it takes 10.1N to pull, 11.2 N to push
-11% above average
-pretty good right
-EXCEPT because of the stand
-there's not bottom magnets so accessories are going to rotate easier
-not an issue for certain grips but wallets might be an issue
-now unlike the Ultra Hybrid,  this Ultra Hybrid S comes with metallic integrated buttons 
-it's a good look on the case
-personally, they're too rounded but that's just me
-even small things like the red mark accent on the action button 
-ok, enough gushing over these buttons
-because what spigen did with the camera control button is a travesty
-there's no button, just a piece of plastic
-even the dumpy normal Ultra Hybrid has a camera control button
-Apple designed this button to slide BUT with the plastic cover my finger gets caught on the TPU
-WHHY

snippet.title: iPHONE 17 PRO MAX VS SAMSUNG S25 ULTRA DETAYLI KARŞILAŞTIRMA
snippet.description:
iPhone 17 Pro Max vs Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra – Hangisi Daha İyi? Detaylı İnceleme

00:00 Giriş
01:06 Kutu İçerikleri
01:35 Ekran Karşılaştırma
03:13 Pil Karşılaştırma
04:42 İşlemci Karşılaştırma
08:12 Kamera Karşılaştıma
17:50 Kamera Yorumum
21:17 Hangisi Alınır?

Bugünkü videomuzda 2025 yılının en iddialı iki amiral gemisi olan Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max ve Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra modellerini tüm detaylarıyla karşılaştırıyoruz. Ekran, kamera, batarya, performans ve kullanıcı deneyimi açısından hangi modelin size daha uygun olduğuna birlikte karar vereceğiz.

Ekran

Her iki model de 6.9 inç büyüklüğünde oldukça büyük bir ekranla geliyor. iPhone 17 Pro Max’te OLED Super Retina XDR panel kullanılırken, Galaxy S25 Ultra’da Dynamic AMOLED 2X teknolojisi bulunuyor. Samsung, 1440x3120 çözünürlük ve 498 PPI ile daha keskin bir görüntü sunarken, iPhone’un çözünürlüğü 1320x2868 ve piksel yoğunluğu 460 PPI seviyesinde. Parlaklık konusunda ise iPhone 17 Pro Max tam 3000 nit maksimum parlaklığa ulaşarak piyasadaki en yüksek değeri sunuyor; S25 Ultra ise 2600 nit maksimum parlaklık ile onu takip ediyor. Ekran dayanıklılığında Apple Corning Ceramic Shield Glass Gen2, Samsung ise Gorilla Armor 2 kullanıyor. Ekran yenileme hızları ve LTPO teknolojisi her iki modelde de aynı olsa da, ekran gövde oranında Samsung %92,39 ile Apple’ın %90,83 oranını geçmeyi başarıyor.

Batarya ve Şarj

Batarya tarafında Samsung’un bir miktar avantajı bulunuyor. Galaxy S25 Ultra 5000 mAh kapasiteye sahipken iPhone 17 Pro Max 4832 mAh, eSIM modelde ise 5088 mAh kapasite sunuyor. Samsung’un 45W hızlı şarj desteği, Apple’ın 40W hızından biraz daha güçlü. Ancak kablosuz hızlı şarjda MagSafe 30W desteği ile Apple belirgin bir avantaj oluşturuyor. Apple ayrıca 20 dakikada %50 şarj vaadiyle pratik kullanımda oldukça iddialı konumda.

Kamera

Kamera tarafında iki cihaz farklı güçlü yönlere sahip. iPhone 17 Pro Max’in ana kamerası 48 MP çözünürlüğe sahip olsa da, Apple ProRes, ProRes RAW, Dolby Vision HDR, Apple Log 2 ve 4K 120fps HDR videolar sayesinde profesyonel video içerik üreticilerine ciddi avantaj sunuyor. Ayrıca Sensor-Shift OIS, fiziksel deklanşör tuşu, 2 cm makro ve 3 adet 48 MP sensör ile güçlü bir yapıya sahip.

Samsung tarafında ise 200 MP ana kamera, 8K 30fps HDR10+ çekim, Laser Auto Focus ve 100x dijital zoom gibi çok güçlü fotoğraf özellikleri bulunuyor. Telefoto modüllerinde Samsung’un 5x optik ve 100x dijital zoom’u iPhone’un 4x optik – 40x dijital zoom kapasitesinin belirgin şekilde önünde. DxOMark v6 kamera skorunda S25 Ultra’nın 151 puan alması da bunu doğruluyor.

Performans

Performans açısından iPhone 17 Pro Max üzerinde Apple A19 Pro işlemcisi yer alıyor. 3nm üretim mimarisine sahip bu işlemci 4.26 GHz frekansta çalışıyor ve Apple’ın yüksek optimizasyon kabiliyeti ile birleşerek gerçek kullanımda oldukça hızlı ve stabil bir deneyim sunuyor. Galaxy S25 Ultra tarafında ise Snapdragon 8 Elite işlemcisi bulunuyor. O da 3nm üretim teknolojisine sahip ve 4.47 GHz hızla çalışıyor. Kağıt üzerinde ve benchmark testlerinde Samsung’un avantajı daha büyük: AnTuTu v11 testinde 3.182.500 puan ve Geekbench multicore 9950 puan alıyor. Grafik tarafında Adreno 830 da oldukça güçlü bir GPU performansı sergiliyor.

Ön Kamera

iPhone 17 Pro Max, 18 MP TrueDepth ön kamera ile öne çıkarken 4K 60fps ProRes destekli video çekebiliyor. Samsung S25 Ultra’da ise 12 MP ön kamera mevcut ve HDR10+ destekli 4K 60fps video kayıt imkanı bulunuyor. Kağıt üzerinde Apple daha yüksek çözünürlüğe sahip olsa da, Samsung’un HDR10+ ve Dual Pixel AF desteği selfie video kalitesini oldukça güçlü kılıyor.

Sonuç ve Genel Değerlendirme

Her iki model de kendi alanında sınıfının zirvesini temsil ediyor.

Fotoğraf ve zoom performansı önceliği olan kullanıcılar için Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra daha doğru seçim olacaktır.

Profesyonel video çekimi yapan, sinematik içerik üreten ve iOS ekosisteminden yararlanmak isteyen kullanıcılar için iPhone 17 Pro Max çok daha avantajlı.

Ekran konusunda Samsung daha yüksek çözünürlük ve daha büyük ekran gövde oranı sunarken, Apple parlaklık ve renk doğruluğunda öne çıkıyor.

Performans ve oyun deneyiminde Samsung testlerde daha yüksek skor alıyor, Apple ise stabilite ve optimizasyon ile fark yaratıyor.

Batarya tarafında Samsung daha büyük kapasite sunuyor, Apple daha hızlı kablosuz şarj avantajına sahip.

Her iki telefonun da kullanıcı profilleri farklı ve seçim tamamen ihtiyaçlara göre şekilleniyor. #iphone17promax #samsungs25ultra #inceleme

snippet.title: Emulation or Native? REDMAGIC 11 PRO vs iPhone 17 Pro Max - Resident Evil 4 Remake & Resident Evil 2
snippet.description:
Since this video and test was highly requested, here I will be doing some PC gaming tests between both the RedMagic 11 Pro and iPhone 17 Pro Max. I will test using both Resident Evil 4 Remake and Resident Evil 2 Remake. This video is purely premised on seeing the differences between PC emulation on the latest snapdragon 8 elite gen 5 vs the native PC ports on iOS. Like the title states, this video will help shed light on the experience you’ll get when emulating PC games vs the experience on a native iOS port. Last, this video and comparison is not a reflection of the performance differences between the Snap 8 elite gen 5 vs A19 Pro. snippet.title: OnePlus 15 vs iPhone 17 Pro: 2025 Ka Sabse Taqatwar Flagship Battle
snippet.description:
OnePlus 15 vs iPhone 17 Pro: Powerhouse Android vs Pro-Level iOS

When choosing between the OnePlus 15 and the iPhone 17 Pro, you're looking at two very different philosophies of flagship design — one focused on raw performance, blazing refresh rates, and value, and the other on refined ecosystem integration, camera excellence, and efficiency.

Performance & Chipset
The OnePlus 15 is powered by the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chipset.  This 3 nm chip offers extremely high performance, especially for multitasking and gaming. It’s paired with a massive 7,300 mAh battery, which supports 120 W wired charging and 50 W wireless charging, making it ideal for power users. 

On the iPhone side, the 17 Pro runs on Apple’s A19 Pro chip, which Apple says delivers a major leap in performance and efficiency.  Thanks to a vapor-chamber cooling system built into its unibody aluminum frame, the iPhone 17 Pro maintains high performance even under load.  Its architecture is designed to make machine-learning, video editing, and intensive usage feel smoother and more efficient.

Display & Build
OnePlus 15 offers a 6.78-inch 1.5K LTPO AMOLED display with a super-smooth 165 Hz refresh rate, making it one of the fastest displays around.  The phone is also very durable, offering IP66 / IP68 / IP69K dust and water resistance. 

The iPhone 17 Pro, meanwhile, uses a 6.3-inch Super Retina XDR OLED display with ProMotion 120Hz support and up to 3,000 nits of peak brightness — ideal for HDR content and visibility in bright light.  Its front and back are protected by “Ceramic Shield 2,” giving it excellent scratch resistance. 

Camera System
OnePlus 15 features a triple 50 MP camera setup: a main sensor, ultra-wide lens, and a 3.5× periscope telephoto lens, as announced in its launch.  This gives users solid flexibility for photos and zoom.

The iPhone 17 Pro goes even further with three 48 MP “Fusion” cameras — Main, Ultra Wide, and Telephoto — delivering high-quality imaging.  The telephoto lens reportedly supports up to 8× “Fusion-quality” zoom, letting you capture distant detail with remarkable clarity.  For creators, it also offers ProRes RAW, Apple Log 2, and advanced video capabilities for professional-grade filmmaking. 

Battery, Charging & Efficiency
Thanks to the huge 7,300 mAh battery, the OnePlus 15 excels in long usage. But it also supports very fast charging, meaning you don’t have to wait long to top up. 

The iPhone 17 Pro benefits from both its efficient A19 Pro chip and improved thermal design. Apple claims it offers its “best-ever” performance and a notable leap in battery life.  It can also charge rapidly with Apple’s 40W adapter (optional accessory). 

Software & Ecosystem
OnePlus 15 runs on OxygenOS 16, which offers a customizable, powerful Android experience.  On the other hand, iPhone 17 Pro runs iOS (iOS 26), giving access to Apple’s tightly integrated ecosystem, seamless device continuity, and long-term software support. 

Conclusion

Choose OnePlus 15 if you want maximum hardware firepower, a massive and fast-charging battery, and a super-smooth 165 Hz display — especially if you're into gaming or productivity.

Choose iPhone 17 Pro if you value a more premium build, top-tier camera capabilities, long-term software support, and a refined iOS experience with pro-level video featuring

snippet.title: iPhone 17 Pro Review - Should You Upgrade?
snippet.description:
Thinking about upgrading to the iPhone 17 Pro from an older model like the iPhone 12?
In this video, I share my honest, unbiased experience after switching phones — without watching any reviews beforehand.

📱 I’ve been using the iPhone 12 for years, so this jump felt massive.
The first thing that hit me was the sound — louder, clearer, and a big difference when watching videos or listening to music.

Then there’s the camera bump. Unexpectedly… I love it.
My finger naturally rests underneath, making the phone easier to hold.
And the camera system itself? A whole new world compared to the iPhone 12.

I also walk you through:
✔️ The cinematic mode that replaced my DSLR
✔️ Why I chose the silver model
✔️ The huge improvement from 60 Hz to 120 Hz
✔️ Battery life that now lasts me around 1.5 days
✔️ What I don’t like — especially the new camera button
✔️ Why USB-C is a game changer coming from the 12
✔️ Going from 64 GB to 256 GB and finally having storage freedom

🎥 This entire video was filmed on the iPhone 17 Pro in 2x cinematic mode,
with only a few B-roll clips coming from my iPhone 12 in 4K, so you can compare the quality side by side.

By the end, you’ll know exactly how the iPhone 17 Pro feels in daily use — and whether upgrading from the iPhone 12 is really worth it.

🌍 Tested in real-life, daily situations — no bias, no influence

💡 If you enjoy tech reviews, real-world comparisons, and honest upgrade impressions, don’t forget to like 👍, comment 💬, and subscribe 🔔 — I make weekly videos about tech, lifestyle, and everyday upgrades.
